For API_KEY_STRIPE: lastRotated=2026-03-30, policy=30 days → expires 2026-04-29 → 20 days until expiry → OK with 14-day window. Let me adjust to make it fall into warning: lastRotated=2026-03-05, policy=30 → expires 2026-04-04 → already expired. Let me use: lastRotated=2026-03-20, policy=30 → expires 2026-04-19 → 10 days until expiry → WARNING.

input.content:
name: Secret Rotation Validator

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 8 * * *"
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      warning_days:
        description: "Warning window in days"
        required: false
        default: "14"
      output_format:
        description: "Output format (json or markdown)"
        required: false
        default: "markdown"
      reference_date:
        description: "Reference date (YYYY-MM-DD) for evaluation"
        required: false
        default: "2026-04-09"

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-secrets:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      WARNING_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.warning_days || '14' }}
      OUTPUT_FORMAT: ${{ github.event.inputs.output_format || 'json' }}
      REFERENCE_DATE: ${{ github.event.inputs.reference_date || '2026-04-09' }}
      FIXTURE_FILE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture_file || 'fixtures/mixed-urgency.json' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Run secret rotation validator (JSON)
        id: validate_json
        run: |
          echo "=== JSON Report ==="
          bun run main.ts \
            --config "$FIXTURE_FILE" \
            --format json \
            --warning-days "$WARNING_DAYS" \
            --reference-date "$REFERENCE_DATE" || true

      - name: Run secret rotation validator (Markdown)
        id: validate_md
        run: |
          echo "=== Markdown Report ==="
          bun run main.ts \
            --config "$FIXTURE_FILE" \
            --format markdown \
            --warning-days "$WARNING_DAYS" \
            --reference-date "$REFERENCE_DATE" || true

      - name: Summary
        run: |
          echo "Secret rotation validation complete."
          echo "Format: $OUTPUT_FORMAT"
          echo "Warning window: $WARNING_DAYS days"
          echo "Reference date: $REFERENCE_DATE"
          echo "Fixture: $FIXTURE_FILE"

file.content:
name: Secret Rotation Validator

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 8 * * *"
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      warning_days:
        description: "Warning window in days"
        required: false
        default: "14"
      output_format:
        description: "Output format (json or markdown)"
        required: false
        default: "markdown"
      reference_date:
        description: "Reference date (YYYY-MM-DD) for evaluation"
        required: false
        default: "2026-04-09"

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-secrets:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      WARNING_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.warning_days || '14' }}
      OUTPUT_FORMAT: ${{ github.event.inputs.output_format || 'json' }}
      REFERENCE_DATE: ${{ github.event.inputs.reference_date || '2026-04-09' }}
      FIXTURE_FILE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture_file || 'fixtures/mixed-urgency.json' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Run secret rotation validator (JSON)
        id: validate_json
        run: |
          echo "=== JSON Report ==="
          bun run main.ts \
            --config "$FIXTURE_FILE" \
            --format json \
            --warning-days "$WARNING_DAYS" \
            --reference-date "$REFERENCE_DATE" || true

      - name: Run secret rotation validator (Markdown)
        id: validate_md
        run: |
          echo "=== Markdown Report ==="
          bun run main.ts \
            --config "$FIXTURE_FILE" \
            --format markdown \
            --warning-days "$WARNING_DAYS" \
            --reference-date "$REFERENCE_DATE" || true

      - name: Summary
        run: |
          echo "Secret rotation validation complete."
          echo "Format: $OUTPUT_FORMAT"
          echo "Warning window: $WARNING_DAYS days"
          echo "Reference date: $REFERENCE_DATE"
          echo "Fixture: $FIXTURE_FILE"

input.old_string:
reference_date:
        description: "Reference date (YYYY-MM-DD) for evaluation"
        required: false
        default: "2026-04-09"
input.new_string:
reference_date:
        description: "Reference date (YYYY-MM-DD) for evaluation"
        required: false
        default: "2026-04-09"
      fixture_file:
        description: "Path to secrets fixture JSON file"
        required: false
        default: "fixtures/mixed-urgency.json"

        required: false
        default: "fixtures/mixed-urgency.json"
tool_use_result.originalFile:
name: Secret Rotation Validator

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 8 * * *"
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      warning_days:
        description: "Warning window in days"
        required: false
        default: "14"
      output_format:
        description: "Output format (json or markdown)"
        required: false
        default: "markdown"
      reference_date:
        description: "Reference date (YYYY-MM-DD) for evaluation"
        required: false
        default: "2026-04-09"

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-secrets:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      WARNING_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.warning_days || '14' }}
      OUTPUT_FORMAT: ${{ github.event.inputs.output_format || 'json' }}
      REFERENCE_DATE: ${{ github.event.inputs.reference_date || '2026-04-09' }}
      FIXTURE_FILE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture_file || 'fixtures/mixed-urgency.json' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Run secret rotation validator (JSON)
        id: validate_json
        run: |
          echo "=== JSON Report ==="
          bun run main.ts \
            --config "$FIXTURE_FILE" \
            --format json \
            --warning-days "$WARNING_DAYS" \
            --reference-date "$REFERENCE_DATE" || true

      - name: Run secret rotation validator (Markdown)
        id: validate_md
        run: |
          echo "=== Markdown Report ==="
          bun run main.ts \
            --config "$FIXTURE_FILE" \
            --format markdown \
            --warning-days "$WARNING_DAYS" \
            --reference-date "$REFERENCE_DATE" || true

      - name: Summary
        run: |
          echo "Secret rotation validation complete."
          echo "Format: $OUTPUT_FORMAT"
          echo "Warning window: $WARNING_DAYS days"
          echo "Reference date: $REFERENCE_DATE"
          echo "Fixture: $FIXTURE_FILE"

lines: +        description: "Path to secrets fixture JSON file"

content.text:
All tasks complete. Here's a summary of what was built:

**Source files:**
- `types.ts` — Domain types (`SecretConfig`, `SecretStatus`, `RotationReport`, `Urgency`, `OutputFormat`)
- `validator.ts` — Core logic: `daysBetween()`, `evaluateSecret()`, `buildReport()` with input validation
- `formatter.ts` — Output formatters for JSON and Markdown table formats
- `main.ts` — CLI entry point accepting `--config`, `--format`, `--warning-days`, `--reference-date`

**Test fixtures:**
- `fixtures/mixed-urgency.json` — 1 expired, 1 warning, 1 ok secret
- `fixtures/all-ok.json` — 2 fresh secrets
- `fixtures/all-expired.json` — 2 long-expired secrets

**Workflow:** `.github/workflows/secret-rotation-validator.yml`
- Triggers: push, pull_request, schedule (daily 8am), workflow_dispatch with configurable inputs
- Steps: checkout, setup Bun, install deps, run validator in both JSON and Markdown formats
- Passes actionlint cleanly

**Test harness:** `validator.test.ts` — 7 tests total
- 4 workflow structure tests (YAML structure, jobs/steps, file references, actionlint)
- 3 act integration tests (one per fixture), each asserting exact expected values for urgency, days, expiry dates, and markdown table rows
- All output appended to `act-result.txt` (415 lines, 3x "Job succeeded")

result:
All tasks complete. Here's a summary of what was built:

**Source files:**
- `types.ts` — Domain types (`SecretConfig`, `SecretStatus`, `RotationReport`, `Urgency`, `OutputFormat`)
- `validator.ts` — Core logic: `daysBetween()`, `evaluateSecret()`, `buildReport()` with input validation
- `formatter.ts` — Output formatters for JSON and Markdown table formats
- `main.ts` — CLI entry point accepting `--config`, `--format`, `--warning-days`, `--reference-date`

**Test fixtures:**
- `fixtures/mixed-urgency.json` — 1 expired, 1 warning, 1 ok secret
- `fixtures/all-ok.json` — 2 fresh secrets
- `fixtures/all-expired.json` — 2 long-expired secrets

**Workflow:** `.github/workflows/secret-rotation-validator.yml`
- Triggers: push, pull_request, schedule (daily 8am), workflow_dispatch with configurable inputs
- Steps: checkout, setup Bun, install deps, run validator in both JSON and Markdown formats
- Passes actionlint cleanly

**Test harness:** `validator.test.ts` — 7 tests total
- 4 workflow structure tests (YAML structure, jobs/steps, file references, actionlint)
- 3 act integration tests (one per fixture), each asserting exact expected values for urgency, days, expiry dates, and markdown table rows
- All output appended to `act-result.txt` (415 lines, 3x "Job succeeded")
